TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Baba_Ali, title = Baba_Ali, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baba_Ali} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1974, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 10, Baba Ali, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Baba Ali mrkays beh Los Angeles, California. Baba Ali maki msqun, maki 2 la'iy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

kawas tay 1974, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 10, Baba Ali, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Baba Ali mrkays beh Los Angeles, California. Baba Ali maki msqun, maki 2 la'iy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, βaβa ali, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral βaβa ali mrkajs~ɕ βeħ los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ, ʦ~ʨali*ornia. βaβa ali maki ms~ɕqun, maki * laʔij. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
